author: doll-agent
content: Added score() to FittedKNeighborsClassifier (mean accuracy), FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier (mean accuracy), FittedNearestCentroid (mean accuracy), FittedKNeighborsRegressor (R²), FittedRadiusNeighborsRegressor (R²). Shared crate::knn::r2_score helper for the regression variant — handles constant-y edge case matching sklearn's RegressorMixin.score behavior. Validated by api_proof tests.
